title: Continental 2026 Cup Stars Poster — Cinematic Grade, Flag-Colour Accents & Print/Web Master Delivery
one_line_ask: Take the client's supplied composited Continental-stars hero plate (three fictional star strikers — Solano, Ferraz and Rocher — plus the trophy already arranged) plus a flag-pattern swatch, and finish it into a cinematic, high-contrast, signature-colour-accented A2 300-dpi print master plus social-media versions using only Adobe connector tools.

issues: Slight color cast and soft edges, but acceptable per brief as a source asset.
Some near-identical tones and minor export halos, also acceptable per brief.
No severe artifacts, no text, no real-world branding, and not a mockup.
Slight motion-blur/smear effect on the diagonal bands may marginally complicate vectorisation but is within acceptable source-file tolerance
Pattern repeat unit is slightly asymmetric at the crop edges but acceptable for a tileable source asset
Near-white areas blend softly into background at corners — minor halo acceptable per brief
Very slight luminance noise in shadow areas of stadium background — acceptable for log-source asset
Centre footballer's lower legs/feet partially obscured by plinth base — minor compositional note
Wet hair on outer two players is nearly identical, suggesting possible mirroring artefact on right figure — worth checking source layers
White shorts on all three players merge slightly with each other in the centre overlap zone — low-contrast separation expected at this grade stage but flagged for masking step

assets.name: continental_poster_A2_master.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
